title: Human walls ground truth
description: Machine-readable ground truth for STRUCTURAL WALLS the reviewer paints on a planta render. These walls are added to consensus.walls with geometry_origin='human_annotation' so polygonize_rooms can form the correct cells when the stage-1 wall extractor misses dividers. Companion to fixtures/planta_74/human_openings_truth.schema.json (openings).

color_mapping.description: RGB → kind. Default contract: BLUE #0000ff and PURPLE #8000ff both map to structural_wall.

calibration.description: Affine transform image-px ↔ PDF-pt computed by auto-calibrate. Saved so downstream tools can reproduce the projection.

consensus_wall_thickness_pts.description: Wall thickness pulled from the consensus this truth was extracted against. New human walls inherit this thickness — no invention.
